recalls.Description: STIHL is recalling the BR 800 Magnum backpack blowers, specifically the X and C-E models, due to a potential laceration hazard caused by the fan wheel. These blowers are identifiable by their gray and orange colors, with "STIHL," "BR 800," and either "X" or "C-E" marked on the rear. The affected units have serial numbers ranging from 546515117 to 547916107, which can be found on a label on the blower tube.
recalls.Title: STIHL Recalls BR 800 Magnum Backpack Blowers Due to Laceration Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact STIHL Inc. at 800-233-4729 between 8 a.m. and 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit www.stihlusa.com/safety/recalls/br800. You can also access the recall information by navigating to "Recalls & Notices" on the STIHL website.

Images.Caption: Recalled STIHL BR 800 X Magnum Backpack Blower
Recalled STIHL BR 800 C-E Magnum Backpack Blower

Manufacturers.Name: STIHL Incorporated, of Virginia Beach, Virginia

Retailers.Name: Available at authorized STIHL independent dealers nationwide from May 2025 through September 2025, priced around $600 for the X model and $700 for the C-E model.

Hazards.Name: Potential laceration hazard from broken fan wheel

Remedies.Name: Stop using the blower and take it to an authorized STIHL dealer for a free inspection and fan wheel replacement.

recalls.metaDescription: STIHL recalls BR 800 Magnum backpack blowers due to a laceration hazard. Learn how to get your blower inspected and repaired for free.

recalls.Description: ECHO has announced a recall of two models of its 59.7cc gas-powered backpack blowers, specifically the PB-5810H and PB-5810T. These blowers, which are suitable for both residential and commercial applications, feature an orange and black design with the brand name 'ECHO' on the starter recoil housing. The model and serial numbers can be found on a label near the right side of the blower's black fan housing. The affected serial numbers are as follows: PB-5810H (P61312001001 to P61312002590) and PB-5810T (P61212001001 to P61212004155).
recalls.Title: ECHO Recalls Gas-Powered Backpack Blowers Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach ECHO at 800-432-3246 from 8 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or email through their website at www.echo-usa.com/customer-support. Additional information is available at www.echo-usa.com/recall or by visiting www.echo-usa.com and selecting 'Product Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled ECHO Blower, Model Number PB-5810H
Recalled ECHO Blower, Model Number PB-5810T
Recalled ECHO Blower serial number location

Manufacturers.Name: ECHO Inc., of Lake Zurich, Illinois

Retailers.Name: Golden Eagle Distributing Company in Rocklin, California, and various independent dealers nationwide, sold from May 2024 through June 2024 for approximately $430.

Hazards.Name: Potential gas leak from the fuel supply line creating a fire hazard

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled blowers and contact an authorized ECHO dealer for a free replacement fuel line installation. ECHO is directly notifying all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: ECHO recalls gas-powered backpack blowers due to a fire risk. Stop using and contact ECHO for a free remedy.

recalls.Description: DR Power Equipment has issued a recall for specific models of walk-behind leaf blowers and vacuums, as well as tow-behind leaf vacuums due to a potential laceration hazard. The affected products may have loose parts that can be ejected during operation, posing a risk to users and those nearby. Consumers are urged to check their units against the provided model numbers to ensure safety.
recalls.Title: DR Power Equipment Recalls Leaf Blowers and Vacuums Due to Injury Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact DR Power LLP at 877-221-4038 from 8:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email recall@drpower.com. More information is available online at https://drpower.com/recalls or by visiting https://www.drpower.com/ and selecting "Product Recalls" at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Walk-Behind Leaf Blowers
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 57,200 (In addition, about 956 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled DR Power Equipment walk-behind leaf blower
Recalled DR Power Equipment walk-behind leaf blower
Recalled DR Power Equipment walk-behind leaf vacuum
Recalled DR Power Equipment walk-behind leaf vacuum
Recalled DR Power Equipment tow-behind leaf vacuum
Recalled DR Power Equipment tow-behind leaf vacuum

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 22 reports of loose pieces being ejected from the units. No injuries have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Generac Power Systems Inc., of Waukesha, Wisconsin

Retailers.Name: Available at independent power equipment retailers nationwide and online at drpower.com from September 2014 to January 2024, priced between $1,300 and $4,000.

Distributors.Name: DR Power Equipment, of South Burlington, Vermont

Hazards.Name: Risk of laceration from ejected parts

recalls.metaDescription: DR Power recalls leaf blowers and vacuums due to laceration hazards. Check model numbers and contact for free repairs.
